name: design-intelligence
description: Source-backed, technology-agnostic UI/UX judgment: product framing, information architecture, interaction design, usability/accessibility review, visual communication, and design-system governance. Deliberately avoids Figma automation, framework recipes, and CSS recipes.

interface.shortDescription: Build better product experiences, not better design files.
interface.longDescription: Design Intelligence gives the host agent a source-backed product and UI/UX judgment system. It routes work through product framing, interface architecture, interaction design, usability and accessibility review, visual communication, and design-system governance. It recognizes common UI surfaces such as forms, data views, search/browse, onboarding, permissions, empty/error states, settings, notifications, and transactions while deliberately avoiding Figma automation, CSS recipes, framework recipes, and design-tool workflows.
capabilities: Forms, data views, search, empty state, and error recovery reasoning
Usability heuristic and cognitive walkthrough review
defaultPrompt: Use Design Intelligence to frame this product decision before designing screens.
Use Design Intelligence to audit this flow for usability, accessibility, hierarchy, interaction, and product risks.
Use Design Intelligence to improve the interface architecture and information hierarchy without focusing on Figma or CSS.
Use Design Intelligence to review this UI surface as task, content, state, feedback, recovery, accessibility, and trust design.
